page_metadata.biotools__summary: NCBI’s database for gene-specific information. It maintains records from genomes which have been completely sequenced, which have an active research community to submit gene-specific information, or which are scheduled for intense sequence analysis.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: NCBI’s database for gene-specific information. It maintains records from genomes which have been completely sequenced, which have an active research community to submit gene-specific information, or which are scheduled for intense sequence analysis.
